items.title: Dow falls 400 points, oil spike moderates amid Middle East tensions
items.description: U.S. stocks fell Tuesday as Middle East tensions drive oil prices higher, increasing investor fears of inflation and global trade disruptions.

items.title: Oil prices surge after strikes kill Iran’s supreme leader, tankers hit near Strait of Hormuz
items.description: International benchmark Brent Crude spiked on Monday amid growing fears of Middle East supply disruptions as the Iran conflict escalates.
